name: Veal Fricasse with Capers & Dill
recipeIngredient: Butter and Flour for white roux
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the veal into 1-inch strips (ensure it's not too lean or too fatty).
2. Cover the veal with water and bring to a slow boil. Rinse the meat clean.
3. Simmer the covered veal in salted white wine, onion, bay leaves, and cloves until cooked through.
4. Prepare a white roux using butter and flour. Strain the stock into the sauce and cook until the flour flavor is gone.
5. Add capers, dill, pepper, and nutmeg. Adjust seasoning to taste.
6. Incorporate the cooked veal into the sauce and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
7. Before serving, whisk together the cream and egg yolks in a separate bowl and pour them slowly into the fricasse.
Serve with rice or noodles. Serves 6.
